MsSuwanOldDoll: ^A porcelain doll sits on a dusty shelf. Ms Suwan slowly walks around it but its glass eyes follow her. She wants to pick it up, hold it, and observe it further.
^Nour: "I hate these kinds of dolls. It's eyes keep following me even when I move around its so creepy."

c-0: ^ I always wanted a doll like this when I was a kid. They were very popular where I grew up and almost all of my friends had them.
^ My mother did not allow me to have one.
^She continues to stare longingly at the doll. She was it to be hers but she can't bring herself to allow that pleasure.

WalkAway: ^She breaks the eye contact between herself and the doll and brings herself to walk away
PartyOldDoll: ^A porcelain doll sits on a dusty shelf. It's piercing glass eyes are difficult to ignore.
